title: The Magic Words
lesson: Kind words like "please" and "thank you" make people smile.
prompts: Place the person from the input image into a cozy, sunny home kitchen, sitting at a wooden table. Medium shot at eye level, the person facing the camera with their face fully visible and a cheerful expression. In the background to the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_70_RACE_ASIAN} stands by the counter holding a plate of cookies, smiling. Warm morning light, soft, bright storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

A cozy home kitchen scene. The person from the input image stands on the far left, facing the camera with their face clearly visible and wide, eager eyes fixed on a plate of cookies, one hand lifting toward it. On the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_70_RACE_ASIAN} holds the plate of cookies and watches with a gentle, patient smile. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm light, soft, bright storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

A cozy home kitchen scene. On the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_70_RACE_ASIAN} holds the plate of cookies and beams happily. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm light, soft, bright storybook illustration style.
